message:
Fix three user-reported issues from hands-on testing

1. Init + commit race: commit now auto-inits repo metadata and HEAD,
   so it works without a prior init call
2. Diff params: accept ?from=&to= as aliases for ?a=&b=
3. No common commits warning: remove multi_ack_detailed (not implemented),
   send ACK instead of NAK when server recognizes have objects

files.patch:
@@ -14,7 +14,6 @@ import { encodePktLine, FLUSH_PKT } from "./pkt-line";
 const BASE_CAPABILITIES = [
   "report-status",
   "delete-refs",
-  "multi_ack_detailed",
   "side-band-64k",
   "thin-pack",
   "ofs-delta",
